     The Numbers Business Report

Zack and Miri Make a Porno (2008)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $31,457,946Details
International Box Office $5,398,360
Worldwide Box Office $36,856,306
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $21,946,130
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $918,038
Total $22,864,168
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Lifelong friends and now roommates, Zack and Miri are buried under a mountain of debt. When the electricity is turned off, they realize that desperate times call for desperate measures. They decide to make an adult film to raise some cash. Though they swear that having sex will not damage their friendship, their business proposition quickly turns into something much more.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$10,065,630 (32.0% of total gross)
Legs:3.13 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:85.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$24,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,735 opening theaters/2,735 max. theaters, 3.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $52,384,740

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 31st, 2008 (Wide) by Weinstein Co.
Video Release: February 3rd, 2009 by Weinstein Co./Genius
MPA Rating: R for Appeal for strong crude sexual content including dialogue, graphic nudity and pervasive language
Running Time: 101 minutes
Plot point: Amateur Porn, Hockey, Money Troubles, Romance
Social setting: Porn Business
Subgenre: Sex Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Weinstein Company, View Askew
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Lifelong friends and now roommates, Zack and Miri are buried under a mountain of debt. When the electricity is turned off, they realize that desperate times call for desperate measures.
